title: Browse listings on the homepage
description: This verifies a shopper can load the marketplace homepage and see product cards rendered from the listings data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify product cards are displayed
Verify product images, titles, and prices are displayed

title: Browse products and open a detail page
description: A shopper can load the homepage, see product cards, and open a product detail page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify product cards are displayed
Open an existing product from the marketplace
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: Open a product detail from the homepage
description: This verifies a shopper can open a listing from the homepage and see the full product detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a product card
Verify the product detail page is displayed
Verify the product image, title, description, price, category, and location are displayed

title: View a product detail page directly
description: This verifies a shopper can open the detail page and inspect a single listing's information.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Verify the product detail page is displayed
Verify the product image, title, description, price, category, and location are displayed

title: Delete a listing from the marketplace home
description: A user can remove a product listing from the homepage and no longer see it in the marketplace list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select an existing product for removal
Confirm deletion
Verify the product is removed from the marketplace list

title: Navigate between marketplace pages from the homepage
description: This verifies a shopper can move from the homepage to other marketplace pages using in-app navigation links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the product creation form
Click the link to the sales listings page
Verify the marketplace navigation pages are accessible from the homepage

title: Create a new product listing
description: This verifies a seller can submit a complete listing with an image and see it reflected in the marketplace.

steps.description: Navigate to /formVenta.html
Fill in the product title field with a unique title
Fill in the product description field with a valid description
Fill in the product price field with a valid price
Select a category
Fill in the product location field with a valid location
Upload a product image file
Submit the product listing form
Verify the new listing appears on the marketplace homepage
Verify the new listing appears in the sales listings page

title: Update a listing and keep it visible in product details
description: A seller can edit an existing product listing and see the updated information on the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing product from the marketplace
Open the listing edit page
Modify the product title
Modify the product description
Modify the product price
Modify the product category
Modify the product location
Submit the updated listing form
Verify the updated listing information is visible on the product detail page

title: Create a listing with the minimum required information
description: This verifies a seller can create a listing successfully using the core fields expected by the form.

steps.description: Navigate to /formVenta.html
Fill in the product title field with a unique title
Fill in the product description field with a valid description
Fill in the product price field with a valid price
Select a category
Fill in the product location field with a valid location
Upload a product image file
Submit the product listing form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the listing is saved and available to browse

title: Filter products by category
description: A shopper can narrow the catalog to one category and see only matching products.

steps.description: Navigate to /ventas.html
Select a category filter
Verify filtered product listings are displayed

title: Remove a listing from the category catalog
description: A user can delete a product and confirm it no longer appears in the category-based catalog view.

steps.description: Navigate to /ventas.html
Select an existing product for removal
Confirm deletion
Verify the product is removed from the catalog list

title: Filter sales listings by category
description: This verifies a shopper can narrow the sales list to a category and see only matching products.

steps.description: Navigate to /ventas.html
Select a category filter
Verify only listings from the selected category are displayed
Verify the filtered sales list is visible

title: Replace a listing image while editing
description: A seller can update an existing listing and replace its image without losing the rest of the listing details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing product from the marketplace
Open the listing edit page
Upload a new image for the listing
Submit the updated listing form
Verify the updated listing is visible on the product detail page
Verify the listing image is displayed

title: Keep the current image when editing a listing
description: A seller can edit listing details without replacing the existing image and still see the updated listing saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing product from the marketplace
Open the listing edit page
Modify the product title
Modify the product description
Submit the updated listing form
Verify the updated listing information is visible on the product detail page

title: Clear a category filter to view the full catalog
description: A shopper can change back from a filtered view to see the broader product catalog again.

steps.description: Navigate to /ventas.html
Select a category filter
Clear the category filter
Verify the full product catalog is displayed

title: Subscribe to the newsletter with full details
description: A guest shopper can submit the newsletter form with name, email, and message and see the subscription saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a short message
Submit the subscription form
Verify the subscription record is saved
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Submit the product form with missing required fields
description: This verifies the product creation form blocks submission when core fields are left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /formVenta.html
Submit the product listing form without filling required fields
Verify form validation errors are visible
Verify the listing is not created

title: Cancel deleting a listing
description: A user can back out of a delete confirmation and keep the listing visible in the marketplace.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select an existing product for removal
Cancel the deletion confirmation
Verify the product remains visible in the marketplace list

title: Save a contact email from the contact form
description: A user can submit an email address through the contact form and see the email saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Submit the contact form
Verify the email record is saved
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Accept a valid contact email submission
description: A user can submit only an email address in the contact form and see it saved successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Submit the contact form
Verify the email record is saved
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Reject an invalid newsletter email
description: A user cannot submit the newsletter form with an invalid email format and sees a validation error instead of a saved record.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the message field with a short message
Submit the subscription form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the subscription is not saved

title: Reject an empty newsletter submission
description: A user cannot submit the newsletter form without the required details and sees validation feedback instead of a saved record.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Submit the subscription form
Verify required field validation is visible
Verify the subscription is not saved

title: Reject an invalid contact email
description: A user cannot save a contact email with an invalid format and sees a validation error instead of a saved record.

steps.description: Navigate to /form.html
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Submit the contact form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the email is not saved
